components_analyzed.reason: IBM AIX 7.2 Standard Support ended in April 2023. The OS is currently in Extended Support through April 2028. While still technically supported, it is past its premier support lifecycle and represents a legacy proprietary Unix environment.

COBOL-2014 (ISO/IEC 1989:2014) is superseded by COBOL 2023. While COBOL implementations (IBM Enterprise COBOL, Micro Focus) remain actively maintained, COBOL-2014 represents a legacy standard with a shrinking developer ecosystem. Applications written in COBOL-2014 carry high modernization effort and risk.

Oracle Database 19c Premier Support ended in January 2024. It is currently in Extended Support (through January 2027). As of 2025, Oracle 21c and 23c are the current releases. Oracle 19c still receives security patches under Extended Support but at additional cost.
